English:
Parents: Honey, do you want to go surfing with Mom and Dad? I heard there's a new snorkeling place right on the beach, and they're offering a two-hour free trial.


Child: No, I have a game plan with a friend, and I'd be embarrassed to miss it.
Chinese:
父母：宝贝，你想和爸爸妈妈一起去冲浪吗？我听说海滩上新开了一家浮潜馆，现在提供两小时免费体验。

孩子：不去，我已经和朋友约了一起打游戏，失约会很尴尬。

English:
Small Bird 1: Ever since the old Bird King died, I can't sleep peacefully. I feel uneasy about this migration.

Small Bird 2: I don't really trust the new Bird King either. He's too young and hasn't experienced much

Small Bird 3: I don't know why the old Bird King passed the throne to him...
Chinese:
小鸟1：自从老鸟王去世后，我都睡不好觉了。说实话，我对这次迁徙很不安。

小鸟2：其实我也不太信任新鸟王。他太年轻了，根本就没迁徙过几次。

小鸟3：是啊…不懂老鸟王为什么要把王位传给他……

English:
Parents: We're back! I saw a giant turtle while snorkeling today! It was so exciting!!!

Parents: Hello, honey, are you home? Have you eaten yet, honey?

Parents: Why are you still playing games? You should take a break.
Chinese:
爸爸：我们回来啦！我今天浮潜的时候看到了一只巨大的海龟！超级壮观！！！

妈妈：宝贝，你回来了吗？吃过饭了吗？

爸爸：你怎么还在玩游戏？你应该休息一下。

English:
Small Bird 4: Actually... I have great confidence in the new Bird King. He's a champion from the bird fighting arena! Not only has he escaped hunters, but he's also able to communicate with the sky gods and discern even things in the human world!

Small Bird 5: Yes, yes! I saw him dodge lightning, rush to the evolution factory, and rescue the unconscious chicks.
Chinese:
小鸟4：我对新任鸟王很有信心！他可是斗鸟场的冠军！要知道，鸟王他不仅躲过了猎人的追捕，还能与天神沟通，甚至能洞悉人类世界的事情！

小鸟5：没错，没错！我亲眼看到他在暴雨天躲过了闪电，还冲进化工厂救出了昏迷的小鸟！

English:
Old Bird 1: Traveling with a family is such a hassle. I miss my youth. Back then, it was just me and his dad, and we could go wherever we wanted.

Old Bird 2: Hahahahaha, it's really inconvenient to bring the kids along. Come with us! We'll have someone to look after us along the way.
Chinese:
老鸟1：一大家子迁徙真是太麻烦了。真是怀念我的青春。那时候只有我和孩子他爸，想飞去哪儿就飞去哪儿。

老鸟2：哈哈哈哈，带孩子旅行确实很不方便。不如跟我们一起走吧！一路互相有个照应。

English:
Parents: Honey, We are going hiking this weekend. Do you want to come with me?

Child: No. I haven't even finished this game yet.

Parents: Okay, if you're tired, go for a walk. You can't stay home all summer. Your brain won't be as active!
Chinese:
父母：宝贝，我们这周末要去远足。你想跟我们一起去吗？

孩子：不想。我还没玩完这个游戏呢。

父母：好吧，如果你累了，就出去走走。你不能整个夏天都待在家里，那样对身体不好。

English:
Small Bird 6: The scenery here is truly beautiful.

Old Bird 3: I remember ten years ago, this place was all factories. Now, you can even rest here.

Old Bird 4: Yeah, it's wonderful.
Chinese:
小鸟6：这里的景色真美，简直是仙境！

老鸟3：我记得十年前这里全是煤窑工厂，现在居然改成保护区了。

老鸟4：是啊，真好。我们可以在这里休息一会。

English:
Parents: Honey, this is your email. It seems to be from the same game company you play.

Parents: Why did he call you the bird savior?

Child: Because I am! I lead the flight of thousands of migratory birds!
Chinese:
父母：宝贝，这是你的邮件。好像是哪个游戏公司发来的。

父母：不过他为什么叫你“鸟类救星”？

孩子：因为我就是！我正在带领着成千上万只候鸟迁徙！

English:
Bird Follower 1: It feels like I've flown a long way. I'm definitely feeling a bit calmer. 

Bird Follower 2: Look! Everyone here is still wearing short sleeves!

Bird Follower 3: Hey! Don't get too close.

Bird Follower 4: I just want to see the latest fashion trends...
Chinese:
鸟儿1：感觉飞了好远啊。现在气候缓和多了。

鸟儿2：看！这里的人都还穿着短袖呢！

鸟儿3：嘿！别靠人类太近。

鸟儿4：好吧~我只是想看看人类最新的时尚潮流……

English:
Parents: Honey, I got a receipt. It's from your game company.

Child: Oh, I bought it with my scholarship. My friends all bought it. 

Parents: Here you go, but remember not to spend too much money on games. You're graduating soon.

Child: I know, I remember, I know.
Chinese:
父母：宝贝，桌上的信用卡账单是你的？你买了福利彩票？

孩子：大部分都是我玩游戏兑换的。我的朋友们也都买了。

父母：这听起来像是赌博。记住你马上就要毕业了，别耽误学业。

孩子：不是赌博。我自己知道怎么回事，别管我。

English:
Parents: We received a bill today for your gaming credit card.

Parents: Dad and I take this very seriously. This isn't gaming, this is gambling!!!

Parents: Your life has been completely disrupted, and you need to stop.

Do you hear me? Hey!
Chinese:
爸爸：我们今天收到了你信用卡的账单。听着！你在这个游戏上充太多钱了。

妈妈：这根本不是游戏，这是赌博！！！他们不断给你小礼品，就为了让你一直充钱玩下去。

父母：你的生活已经被彻底打乱了，你必须停止。

父母：你听见了吗？嘿！

English:
Bird Follower 5: Actually, the new Bird King is quite nice, but he doesn't talk much. Is he shy?

Bird Follower 6: The new Bird King is in love... The bird he likes doesn't want to migrate with him, saying they have different lifestyles and can't be together.

Bird Follower 7: What!!!????
Chinese:
鸟人5：其实，新来的鸟王人挺好的，就是不怎么说话。他是不是害羞？

鸟人6：新来的鸟王恋爱了……不过他喜欢的那只鸟儿不想跟他一起迁徙，说什么他们生活方式不一样，不能在一起。

鸟人7：什么？！！鸟王已经有心仪的鸟了？

English:
Bird Fan 1: I found out! The bird the Bird King favored seemed to be his companion in the bird fighting arena. It was said to be a domesticated pet. But the Bird King won and was released, while the pet bird didn't win and never came out.

Bird Fan 2: Huh? Is the pet bird still alive?

Bird Fan 1: I don't know, but the chances of it being a bad omen are slim.
Chinese:
鸟迷1：我打听到了！！！鸟王偏爱的那只鸟，似乎是他在斗鸟场上的伙伴。据说那是一只家养宠物。鸟王赢了比赛被释放了，但是那只宠物鸟输了比赛。

鸟迷2：咦？那只宠物鸟还活着吗？

鸟迷1：我不知道，没他消息了。活着的可能性很小了。

English:
Parents: Why are you moving out so suddenly?

Parents: Sharing with your friends?

Parents: Aren't you broke?
Chinese:
父母：你为什么突然搬出去？

父母：和朋友合住？

父母：你不是已经没钱吗？

English:
Parents: You've got a debt collection call at home!!!

Parents: Such a large sum! How could you possibly owe such a large sum?!

Parents: This time, Dad and I will help you pay off your debt. We have no savings left. You must stop gambling.
Chinese:
父母：家里有催债电话！！！

父母：这么多钱！你怎么可能欠这么多钱？！

孩子：……………………………………

父母：这次，爸爸妈妈会帮你还清债务。我们已经没有积蓄了。你必须停止赌博。

English:
Bird Fan 3: Have you heard? The pet bird seems to be still alive.

Bird Fan 4: No way! Wasn't it said to be dead?

Bird Fan 5: Rumor has it! The pet bird isn't dead! It's just badly injured and is currently in someone's hands.
Chinese:
鸟迷3：你听说了吗？那只宠物鸟好像还活着。

鸟迷4：不会吧！它不是说死了吗？

鸟迷5：传言是真的！那只宠物鸟没死！只是受了重伤，现在在某个人类手里。

English:
Bird Fan 6: This place looks familiar. I seem to be almost at my destination. It looks like this journey is coming to a safe end.

Bird Fan 7: We're indeed almost in the safe zone. Sigh, do you think the Bird King will go retrieve his pet bird?

Bird Fan 8: I don't know. Can pet birds survive in the wild?
Chinese:
鸟迷6：这地方看起来好眼熟啊。我好像快到目的地了。看来这次迁徙就要安全结束了。

鸟迷7：我们确实快到安全区了。唉，你们觉得鸟王会去把他的宠物鸟带回来吗？

鸟迷8：我不知道。宠物鸟能在野外生存吗？

English:
Parents: Your friend told me you borrowed money from him and haven't paid it back yet.

Parents: Is that so?
Chinese:
父母：你朋友告诉我你向他借了钱，但还没还。

父母：是吗？回答我。别不出声。

English:
Bird Fans: Hey, hey! Where's the Bird King?

Bird Fans: He's gone.
Chinese:
鸟迷们：嘿，嘿！鸟王去哪儿了？

鸟迷们：鸟王安顿好大家后就立刻飞走了。

鸟迷们：是去找宠物鸟了吗？

鸟迷们：天哪，真是绝美的爱情~

English:
Parents: Aren't you planning on continuing your studies?

Child: I don't have the heart to do it anymore.

Parents: Well, my family can't afford it anymore.
Chinese:
父母：你不打算继续学业了吗？

孩子：我没那个精力继续学下去了。

父母：唉，我家负担不起了。

English:
<align="center"><size=150%><color=#FFFF00>Ha ! A commander with no troops !</color></size></align>

Oh my God !  What have you done ? ! 

All the little birds that followed you are dead !

You're no true Bird King at all !
Chinese:
<align="center"><size=150%><color=#FFFF00>哈！光杆司令！</color></size></align>

我的天哪！看看你都做了些什么？！

所有追随你的小鸟都死了！

你根本不是什么真正的鸟王！

English: Restart
Chinese: 再试一次

English: God Calling
Chinese: 上帝来电

English: Bird King Power
Chinese: 鸟王力量

English:
<align="center"><size=150%><color=#FFFF00>Sorry ! Failed to inherit the throne... </color></size></align>

You’re flying way too slowly and getting lost. 

The weather is getting colder and colder; at this rate, it seems you won't reach your destination…

In the end, the birds believed you were not capable enough to lead the flock and elected a new king.

The flock flew away with the new king…
Chinese:
<align="center"><size=150%><color=#FFFF00>抱歉！继位失败……</color></size></align>

你飞得太慢了，冷空气都追上你了。

鸟群根本受不了低温，你也冻得头昏脑胀，失去了方向……

最终，鸟群认为你没有能力领导它们，于是重新选出了一位新鸟王。他们都跟随新王飞走了……
